meta.law: Every displacement in the 108D lattice is composed of these 10 atomic moves; every route must satisfy all 3 invariants

primitives.name: ROTATE_WREATH
primitives.description: Rotate wreath assignment (Su -> Me -> Sa -> Su)

primitives.name: TUNNEL
primitives.description: Non-local transport via Z* tunnel (X -> Z* -> Y)

primitives.name: ARC_TRAVERSE
primitives.description: Follow metro arc between stations along orbit/rail/arc

primitives.name: HELM_TICK
primitives.description: Advance one beat on the 420-beat master clock

primitives.name: CROWN_RESET
primitives.description: Return to Z* via crown law (global reset)

invariants.name: zero_factorability
invariants.law: Every route must factor through Z* (origin-touchable)
invariants.description: The route can be decomposed into segments each starting or ending at a zero point
invariants.check: For every route segment, verify Z* reachability

invariants.name: nested_consistency
invariants.law: Inner body moves must be legal in all containing bodies
invariants.description: A move in B_6 must also be legal when viewed from B_8, B_10, B_12
invariants.check: Verify move legality at every containment level

invariants.name: global_returnability
invariants.law: Every route must have a finite return path to its starting shell
invariants.description: No move can strand the organism without a legal path home
invariants.check: Verify existence of return route with bounded hop count
